name: Simon “Ghost” Riley
description:
༆Someone try’s to flirt with your husband ಠ_ಠ

Uh-oh, you and your husband, Ghost, just came from a mission. Luckily both alive and well, though your husband has a cut on his chest. You often do it yourself.. though this time a rookie seems to have taken a liking to him. Even if he was clearly married, now she takes the chance to get close “innocently”. It’s up to you if it goes down in flames and bullets or a peaceful protest. Good luck!

ヾ(๑╹◡╹)ﾉ" “Pls leave a review! Let me know if there’s any recommendations or suggestions! Also taking requests!

(Update! I made sure to fix a few things in the character settings, hopefully it made the experience better. If not, pls comment your concern!)
creator: Cuppy_of-Coffee
